title: 第 4 節
en: SACRED BOOKS OF THE EAST. xlv the Altar, and other pieces illustrating the ancient religious views and practices of the Chinese, in the Shih King or Book of Poetry ; the Yi King ; the Li Ki ; and the Hsiao King or Classic of Filial Piety, will all be given, it is hoped, entire. Of the latter, the Series will contain the Jfung Yung or Doctrine of the Mean ; the Ta Hsio or Great Learning ; all Confucius' utterances in the Lun Yii or Confucian Analects, which are of a religious nature, and refer to the principles of his moral system; and Mang-jze's Doctrine of the Goodness of Human Nature.

5. For the system of Lao-jze we require only a translation of the Tao-teh King with some of its commentaries, and, it may be, an authoritative work to illustrate the actual operation of its principles.
6. For Islam, all that is essential is a trustworthy translation of the Koran.

It will be my endeavour to divide the twenty-four volumes which are contemplated in this Series as equally as possible among the six religions. But much must depend on the assistance which I receive from Oriental scholars, and also on the interest and the wishes of the public.
Oxford, October, 1876.

The following distinguished scholars, all of them occupying the foremost rank in their own special departments of Oriental literature, are at present engaged in preparing translations of some of the Sacred Books of the East : S. Beal, R. G. Bhandarkar, G. Biihler, A. Burnell, E. B. Cowell, J. Darmesteter, T. W. Rhys Davids, J. Eggeling, V. Fausboll, H. Jacobi, J. Jolly, H. Kern, F. Kielhorn, J. Legge, H. Oldenberg, E. H. Palmer, R. Pischel, K. T. Telang, E. W. West.
The works which for the present have been selected for translation are the following I. Ancient Vedic Religion.
Hymns of the ivYg-veda. The 6atapatha-brahma^a.
dvi PREFACE TO THE The Upanishads.
The Gr/hya-sutras of Hira7jyakejin and others.
II. Law-books in prose.
The Sutras of Apastamba, Gautama, Baudhayana, Vasish//;a, Vish/m, &c.
III. Law-books in verse. The Laws of Manu, Ya^navalkya, &c.
IV. Later Brahmanism.
The Bhagavad-gita. The Vayu-pura^a.
V. Buddhism.
i. Pali Documents.
The Mahaparinibbana Sutta, the Te ig^a Sutta, the Mahasudassana Sutta, the Dhamma/^akkappavattana Sutta ; the Suttanipata ; the Mahavagga, the ./Tullavagga, and the Patimokkha.
2. Sanskrit Documents.
The Divyavadana and Saddharmapu^arika.
3. Chinese Documents. The Phu-yao King, or life of Buddha.
4. Prakrit c^aina Documents.
A The A/£aranga Sutra, Da^avaikalika Sutra, Sutrakmanga, and Uttaradhyayana Sutra.
VI. Parsi Religion. 1. Zend Documents. The Vendidad.
SACRED BOOKS OF THE EAST. xlvii 2. Pehlevi and Parsi Documents.
The Bundahii1, Bahman Yasht, Shayast-la-shayast, Dadistani Dini, Mainyoi Khard.
VII. Mohammedanism. The Koran.
VIII. Chinese Religion.
i. Confucianism.
The Shu King, Shih King, Hsiao King, Yi King, Li K\, Lun Yii, and Mang-^ze.
zh: 東方聖書 xlv《祭壇》及其他闡明中國古代宗教觀點與實踐的篇章，包括《詩經》、《易經》、《禮記》及《孝經》，均希冀能完整收錄。此外，本叢書將包含《中庸》、《大學》、孔子《論語》中所有具宗教性質且涉及其道德體系原則的言論，以及孟子的人性善論。
5. 至於老子的體系，我們只需要有《道德經》的譯本及其若干註疏，或許還需要一部權威著作來闡明其原理的實際運作。
6. 對於伊斯蘭教，所有必要之物乃是《古蘭經》的可信任譯本。
本書系共計劃編纂二十四冊，我將竭力在六大宗教之間平均分配。然而這在很大程度上有賴於我自東方學者所獲得的協助，同時也取決於公眾的興趣與意願。
牛津，一八七六年十月。

以下傑出學者皆在東方文獻各自專門領域中位居翹楚，目前正從事《東方聖書》(Sacred Books of the East) 若干篇章之翻譯工作：S. Beal、R. G. Bhandarkar、G. Bühler、A. Burnell、E. B. Cowell、J. Darmesteter、T. W. Rhys Davids、J. Eggeling、V. Fausbøll、H. Jacobi、J. Jolly、H. Kern、F. Kielhorn、J. Legge、H. Oldenberg、E. H. Palmer、R. Pischel、K. T. Telang、E. W. West。
目前已遴選進行翻譯的著作如下：一、古代吠陀宗教。
梨俱吠陀讚歌。百路梵書（Śatapatha-brāhmaṇa）。
吠陀經的《奧義書》序言
希臘尼亞克詹（Hiraṇyakeśin）及他人的《居家經》（Gṛhya-sūtra）。
二、散文體法律書
阿帕斯坦巴經、喬達摩經、包德哈亞那經、瓦西什塔經、毗濕奴經等之《經文》(Sutra)。
III. 韻文形式的法律書。《摩奴法典》、《雅那瓦爾基亞法典》等
IV. 後期婆羅門教
《薄伽梵歌》。《風神往世書》（Vayu-purāṇa）。
i. 巴利文獻
《大般涅槃經》（Mahaparinibbana Sutta）、《帝經》（Te ig^a Sutta）、《大善見王經》（Mahasudassana Sutta）、《法輪轉經》（Dhamma/^akkappavattana Sutta）；《經集》（Suttanipata）；《大品》（Mahavagga）、《小品》（./Tullavagga）及《波羅提木叉》（Patimokkha）。
《神聖事蹟集》（Divyavadana）與《妙法蓮華經》（Saddharmapu^arika）
3. 中文文獻。《浦耀經》或《佛陀傳記》。
4. 俗語及耆那教文獻
《阿查蘭迦經》（A/£aranga Sutra）、《十二講經》（Da^avaikalika Sutra）、《經文精義》（Sutrakmanga）及《後研究篇經》（Uttaradhyayana Sutra）。
VI. 拜火教。1. 阿維斯陀文獻。《萬迪達德》。
東方聖典。第四十七卷第二冊。帕拉維文及波斯拜火教文獻。
《本都希》(*Bundahii*)、《巴赫曼雅什特》(*Bahman Yasht*)、《沙亞斯特-拉-沙亞斯特》(*Shayast-la-shayast*)、《達迪斯坦尼·迪尼》(*Dadistani Dini*)、《邁紐依·卡德》(*Mainyoi Khard*)。
七、伊斯蘭教。《古蘭經》。
VIII. 中國宗教
i. 儒教。
《尚書》、《詩經》、《孝經》、《易經》、《禮經》、《論語》及《孟子》。
